org.arakhne.neteditor.io.graphml

Class GraphMLReader

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.arakhne.neteditor.io.AbstractNetEditorReader
      • org.arakhne.neteditor.io.xml.AbstractXMLToolReader
        • org.arakhne.neteditor.io.graphml.GraphMLReader
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    GraphMLConstants, NetEditorReader, XMLConstants

    public class GraphMLReader
extends AbstractXMLToolReader
implements GraphMLConstants
    This class permits to read a graph-model from the GraphML format.

    GraphML is a comprehensive and easy-to-use file format for graphs. It consists of a language core to describe the structural properties of a graph and a flexible extension mechanism to add application-specific data.

    Since:
    16.0
    Version:
    17.0 2013-10-23 21:03:04
    Author:
    Stéphane GALLAND
    See Also:
    "http://graphml.graphdrawing.org/"
    Maven Group Id:
    org.arakhne.neteditor
    Maven Artifact Id:
    neteditor-io

      • getPublicDTD

        public static String getPublicDTD()
        Replies the public DTD for GraphML.
        Returns:
        the public DTD.

      • getSystemDTD

        public static URL getSystemDTD()
        Replies the system DTD for GraphML.
        Returns:
        the system DTD.

      • setFigureConnection

        public void setFigureConnection(boolean connectFigures)
        Set the flag that permits to connect the model objects and the figures, or not.
        Parameters:
        connectFigures - indicates if the figures should be linked to their model objects.

      • isFigureConnection

        public boolean isFigureConnection()
        Replies the flag that permits to connect the model objects and the figures, or not.
        Returns:
        true if the figures should be linked to their model objects; otherwise false.

      • setDTDValidation

        public void setDTDValidation(boolean dtdValidation)
        Set the flag that permits to validate, or not, the DTD.
        Parameters:
        dtdValidation - indicates if the DTD should be validated.

      • isDTDValidation

        public boolean isDTDValidation()
        Replies if the DTD is validating when reading.
        Returns:
        true if the DTD is validated; otherwise false.

      • getContentType

        public final NetEditorContentType getContentType()
        Description copied from interface: NetEditorReader
        Replies the type of the last read content by this reader.
        Specified by:
        getContentType in interface NetEditorReader
        Returns:
        the type, or null if unknown.

      • read

        public final <G extends Graph<?,?,?,?>> G read(Class<G> type,
                                File inputFile,
                                Map<UUID,List<ViewComponent>> figures)
                                    throws IOException
        Description copied from interface: NetEditorReader
        Read the specified input stream as a XML file, and extract a graph model and its associated figures.
        Specified by:
        read in interface NetEditorReader
        Type Parameters:
        G - is the expected type of the graph to read from the stream.
        Parameters:
        type - is the expected type of the graph to read from the stream.
        inputFile - is the file to read.
        figures - is the collection of figures that were read from the input stream, from the front to the background.
        Returns:
        the graph read from the input stream.
        Throws:
        IOException
